bind-pdf-form-to-autofiller.title: Bind PDF Form to AutoFiller Instance
bind-pdf-form-to-autofiller.description: Shows how to check for a PDF file, create an AutoFiller, bind the PDF to it, and prepare the instance for further form‑filling actions.

load-csv-into-datatable.title: Load CSV into DataTable for Form Mapping
load-csv-into-datatable.description: Shows how to read a CSV file, treat the first row as column headers, and populate a DataTable that can be used for form mapping.

import-datatable-into-pdf-form-with-cons.title: Import DataTable into PDF Form with Column Constraints
import-datatable-into-pdf-form-with-cons.description: Creates a PDF form template, configures a DataTable with ReadOnly and Unique column settings, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to import the data into matching PDF fields.

fill-pdf-acroform-using-autofiller.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Using AutoFiller and DataTable
fill-pdf-acroform-using-autofiller.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF template, import a populated DataTable, and automatically fill matching AcroForm fields using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller.

save-filled-pdf-preserve-layout.title: Save Filled PDF While Preserving Layout
save-filled-pdf-preserve-layout.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with the Form facade, optionally filling AcroForm fields, and saving the document to a new file while keeping the original layout intact.

pdf-one-page-per-datarow.title: Create PDF with One Page per DataTable Row
pdf-one-page-per-datarow.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF where each DataRow from a DataTable is placed on its own page using Aspose.Pdf, and verifies the page count matches the row count.

map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-fields.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Form Fields and Fill the PDF
map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-fields.description: Demonstrates how to rename DataTable columns to match PDF form field identifiers, verify the mapping, and fill the PDF using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller.

fill-pdf-form-using-datatable.title: Fill PDF Form Using DataTable and AutoFiller
fill-pdf-form-using-datatable.description: Shows how to create a PDF form template, build a DataTable with matching columns, and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to import the data and generate a filled PDF.

fill-pdf-template-with-multiple-csv-work.title: Fill PDF Template with Multiple CSV Worksheets Using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-template-with-multiple-csv-work.description: Loads each CSV file into a DataTable, binds a PDF template, imports the table with AutoFiller, and saves a separate PDF for each worksheet.

fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller-exception-.title: Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller and Exception Handling
fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller-exception-.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to populate a PDF form from a DataTable and includes robust exception handling for missing files and PDF processing errors.

fill-pdf-form-using-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and DataTable
fill-pdf-form-using-autofiller.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF template, importing data from a DataTable into form fields with AutoFiller, saving the filled PDF, and automatically disposing the object.

batch-fill-pdf-template.title: Batch Fill PDF Template with Multiple DataTables
batch-fill-pdf-template.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF form repeatedly with different DataTable data sets, producing separate filled PDFs for each entry.

fill-pdf-form-from-memory-stream.title: Fill PDF Form from Memory Stream Using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-form-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF form template in memory, populating it with data from a DataTable, and filling the form using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller without writing intermediate files.

filter-datatable-fill-pdf-form.title: Filter DataTable and Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller
filter-datatable-fill-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates loading a CSV into a DataTable, filtering rows based on a condition, and using Aspose.Pdf AutoFiller to populate matching form fields in a PDF template and save a subset PDF.

extract-pdf-pages-with-custom-names.title: Extract PDF Pages with Custom Names from DataTable
extract-pdf-pages-with-custom-names.description: Demonstrates how to split a source PDF into individual pages and save each page using a custom file name taken from a DataTable column.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Against DataTable
validate-required-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to create a simple PDF form template, mark fields as required, and verify that each required field has a matching column in a DataTable before filling the form.

log-datatable-rows-to-pdf.title: Log Processed DataTable Rows While Creating PDF Pages
log-datatable-rows-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate over a DataTable, add each row to its own PDF page with Aspose.Pdf, and log the processed row and page number to a text file.

apply-password-protection-to-pdf.title: Apply Password Protection to a PDF
apply-password-protection-to-pdf.description: Shows how to protect a filled PDF with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades after it has been saved.

merge-filled-pdfs-from-datatables.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDFs from DataTables into a Single PDF
merge-filled-pdfs-from-datatables.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form template with data from several DataTables, save each filled document temporarily, and then concatenate all PDFs into one consolidated file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-filled-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Convert Filled PDF to Byte Array Using PdfViewer
convert-filled-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a filled PDF from a file path or stream and obtain its contents as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer, without writing to disk.

async-read-xlsx-write-pdf.title: Asynchronous XLSX Read and PDF Write
async-read-xlsx-write-pdf.description: Demonstrates reading an XLSX file asynchronously into memory, creating a simple PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and writing the PDF to disk using asynchronous file I/O.

verify-filled-pdf-fields-match-datatable.title: Unit Test to Verify Filled PDF Fields Match DataTable
verify-filled-pdf-fields-match-datatable.description: Demonstrates a unit test that fills a PDF form using AutoFiller, reads back the field values with the Form class, and asserts they match the original DataTable entries.

retry-autofiller-import-transient-file-a.title: Retry AutoFiller Import with Transient File Access Handling
retry-autofiller-import-transient-file-a.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable, and implement a retry loop that handles transient I/O and access exceptions.

generate-pdf-page-summary.title: Generate PDF Page Summary with DataTable Row IDs
generate-pdf-page-summary.description: Demonstrates iterating through PDF pages with Aspose.Pdf, retrieving a matching DataTable row identifier for each page, optionally using TableAbsorber, and writing the results to a CSV summary file.

add-date-header-to-pdf.title: Add Date Header to PDF Using AutoFiller and PdfFileStamp
add-date-header-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF template, create a stamp, and add a header containing the current date to every page before saving the document.

fill-pdf-form-from-csv-mapping.title: Fill PDF Form from CSV Using a Mapping Configuration
fill-pdf-form-from-csv-mapping.description: Demonstrates loading a CSV export of Excel, applying a JSON‑based column‑to‑PDF‑field map, and populating an Aspose.Pdf form with the first data row.

batch-fill-pdf-forms-from-csv.title: Batch Fill PDF Forms from Large CSV Using AutoFiller
batch-fill-pdf-forms-from-csv.description: Shows how to stream a large CSV (converted from XLSX) in batches and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF template for each row, preventing memory overload.

validate-pdf-size-after-auto-filling.title: Validate PDF Size After AutoFilling Form
validate-pdf-size-after-auto-filling.description: Demonstrates filling a PDF form with data from a DataTable using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller and then checking that the generated PDF does not exceed a predefined size limit.

fill-pdf-form-from-excel-auto-filler.title: Fill PDF Form from Excel Data using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-form-from-excel-auto-filler.description: Shows how to convert an uploaded XLSX file to a DataTable, bind it to a PDF template, and generate a filled PDF using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller class.

fill-pdf-form-with-timeout-cancellation.title: Fill PDF Form with Timeout Cancellation
fill-pdf-form-with-timeout-cancellation.description: Shows how to bind a PDF template, fill a form field, and save the document asynchronously while using a CancellationToken to abort the operation if it exceeds a specified timeout.

convert-large-pdf-to-excel-with-temp-fol.title: Convert Large PDF to Excel Using Temporary Folder
convert-large-pdf-to-excel-with-temp-fol.description: Demonstrates using a temporary directory for intermediate files while converting a large PDF to Excel with Aspose.Pdf to avoid disk‑space issues.

populate-pdf-form-fields-with-formatted-.title: Populate PDF Form Fields with Formatted Numeric Values
populate-pdf-form-fields-with-formatted-.description: Demonstrates how to format numeric and date values in a DataTable before importing them into PDF form fields using Aspose.Pdf AutoFiller.

add-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent text watermark to every page of a PDF that has already been filled, using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API.

split-filled-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split Filled PDF into Single-Page PDFs
split-filled-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to split a filled PDF into individual one-page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

fill-pdf-form-from-csv.title: Fill PDF Form from CSV using Aspose.Pdf
fill-pdf-form-from-csv.description: Shows how to read field names and values from a CSV file and populate an existing PDF form with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, then save the filled PDF.
